_comment: Golden oracle for #3038 near-dup tiering. Cases derived from real-DB validation (spikes over a 7,651-observation claude-mem.db). corpus builds the IDF model; cases assert classifyPair tiers. cosineThreshold/vetoDf mirror the shipped defaults' intent.
